ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monitoring station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the monitoring station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the station was installed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the station (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the station */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the station */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the operator responsible for the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stations_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES operators ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the station collecting the data */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date the data was collected */,
  "data_file" TEXT /* File path to the dataset file */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Metadata describing the dataset */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of data in the dataset */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Source of the dataset */,
  "measurement_method_id" INTEGER /* Method used to collect the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the dataset this measurement belongs to */,
  "s0" REAL /* Measurement at sensor S0 */,
  "ko" REAL /* Measurement at sensor ko */,
  "ssq_res" REAL /* SSQ residual measurement */,
  "res2" REAL /* Measurement at sensor res2 */,
  "res5" REAL /* Measurement at sensor res5 */,
  "res27" REAL /* Measurement at sensor res27 */,
  "res51" REAL /* Measurement at sensor res51 */,
  "res72" REAL /* Measurement at sensor res72 */,
  "measurement_time" TEXT /* Time of the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operators" (
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operator */,
  "operator_name" TEXT /* Name of the operator */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the operator */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the operator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the dataset being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality metric entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the dataset being evaluated */,
  "quality_metric" TEXT /* Type of quality metric (e.g., accuracy, precision) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the quality metric */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date the evaluation was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* Identifier of the user who generated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the user providing feedback */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Feedback comment */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the recipient user */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message content */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the station triggering the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., pollution, anomaly) */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Threshold value that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was raised */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the dataset */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the instrument */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_deployment" (
  "deployment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deployment entry */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the station */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the instrument */,
  "deployment_date" TEXT /* Date the instrument was deployed */,
  "removal_date" TEXT /* Date the instrument was removed (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deployment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrument_deployment_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrument_deployment_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)
